summary.en: Motor-driven power tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies can generate electromagnetic disturbance. Zimbabwe addresses EMC through SAZ-adopted IEC/CISPR-based standards （typically aligned with SANS adoptions） applied within national conformity and import inspection. For cordless tools with wireless or radio functions, POTRAZ type-approval covers the radio interface, which is a separate obligation from general EMC.
summary.zh: 电机驱动电动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源可能产生电磁骚扰。津巴布韦通过 SAZ 采纳的基于 IEC/CISPR 的标准（通常与 SANS 采纳对齐），在国家符合性与进口检验中处理 EMC。对于带无线或射频功能的无绳工具，POTRAZ 型号核准覆盖射频接口，这是独立于一般 EMC 的义务。
summary.zht: 電機驅動電動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源可能產生電磁騷擾。辛巴威通過 SAZ 採納的基於 IEC/CISPR 的標準（通常與 SANS 採納對齊），在國家符合性與進口檢驗中處理 EMC。對於帶無線或射頻功能的無繩工具，POTRAZ 型號核准覆蓋射頻介面，這是獨立於一般 EMC 的義務。

standards_or_laws: SAZ/ZWS adoption of IEC/CISPR-based EMC standards, SANS-aligned where applicable
POTRAZ type-approval for the radio interface of cordless tools with wireless functions
Zimbabwe national conformity and import inspection framework

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and any wireless module still need Zimbabwe-specific review against SAZ-adopted EMC standards and, for radio functions, POTRAZ type-approval.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及任何无线模块，仍需按 SAZ 采纳的 EMC 标准进行津巴布韦专项复核，并对射频功能进行 POTRAZ 型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及任何無線模組，仍需按 SAZ 採納的 EMC 標準進行辛巴威專項覆核，並對射頻功能進行 POTRAZ 型號核准。

standards_or_laws: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is an EMC report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, controller variants, or worst-case load conditions, and a cordless tool with a wireless module that has no POTRAZ type-approval for the Zimbabwe radio interface.
gap.zh: 常见差距是 EMC 报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包、控制器变体或最不利负载条件；以及带无线模块的无绳工具未对津巴布韦射频接口取得 POTRAZ 型号核准。
gap.zht: 常見差距是 EMC 報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包、控制器變體或最不利負載條件；以及帶無線模組的無繩工具未對辛巴威射頻介面取得 POTRAZ 型號核准。

target.en: Adopted-standard obligation applied through national conformity and import inspection for EMC; separate mandatory POTRAZ type-approval for cordless tools with radio or wireless functions. The SAZ-adopted EMC standards are the technical basis used within the conformity framework.
target.zh: EMC 为通过国家符合性与进口检验适用的采纳标准义务；带射频或无线功能的无绳工具另有强制的 POTRAZ 型号核准。SAZ 采纳的 EMC 标准是符合性框架内使用的技术依据。
target.zht: EMC 為通過國家符合性與進口檢驗適用的採納標準義務；帶射頻或無線功能的無繩工具另有強制的 POTRAZ 型號核准。SAZ 採納的 EMC 標準是符合性框架內使用的技術依據。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but Zimbabwe acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and SAZ-adopted standard mapping, plus POTRAZ for radio functions.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但津巴布韦接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和 SAZ 采纳标准映射，射频功能还需 POTRAZ。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但辛巴威接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和 SAZ 採納標準映射，射頻功能還需 POTRAZ。

source.publisher: Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe (POTRAZ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Zimbabwe-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system against SAZ-adopted EMC standards and any cordless wireless function holds POTRAZ type-approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据按 SAZ 采纳的 EMC 标准覆盖实际销售的工具系统，且任何无绳无线功能持有 POTRAZ 型号核准之前，不能视为津巴布韦就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據按 SAZ 採納的 EMC 標準覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統，且任何無繩無線功能持有 POTRAZ 型號核准之前，不能視為辛巴威就緒。
